title: ADDICTION SERVICES - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK FAMILY COUNSELING CENTER ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides addiction treatment for alcohol and drug use disorder, including assessment, treatment, and prevention services. Services include specialized treatment services for women, assessment and treatment to fulfill a court order for a DUI, relapse prevention, outreach, and education. 906 Main Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 842-8201 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-8201 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and OpenCard. Sliding scale fees and payment arrangements available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income to apply for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Tillamook County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Relapse Prevention Programs Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TILLAMOOK COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK FAMILY COUNSELING CENTER
